ramp.xds: Info Pages

Source: R/xds_info.R
xds_help_info.Rd

A list of all xds_info_* documentation pages in ramp.xds.

Setup & Structure

  • xds_info_basic_setup – basic setup overview

  • xds_info_setup_options – setup options

  • xds_info_patch_dynamics – patch dynamics

  • xds_info_strata – human/host population strata

  • xds_info_aquatic_habitats – aquatic habitats

  • xds_info_dynamical_components – dynamical components

  • xds_info_trivial_forcing – trivial forcing

Human / Host

  • xds_info_interfaces – dynamical interfaces

  • xds_info_search_weights – search weights

  • xds_info_availability – resource availability

  • xds_info_transmission – transmission

Human / Host

  • xds_info_human_populations – human populations

  • xds_info_exposure – exposure

  • xds_info_time_spent – time spent

  • xds_info_time_at_risk – time at risk

  • xds_info_local_fraction – the local fraction

  • xds_info_travel_malaria – travel malaria

  • xds_info_heterogeneity – heterogeneity

  • xds_info_environmental_heterogeneity – environmental heterogeneity

  • xds_info_heterogeneous_biting_rates – heterogeneous biting rates

  • xds_info_relative_biting_rates – relative biting rates

Mosquitoes

  • xds_info_mosquito_bionomics – mosquito bionomics

  • xds_info_mosquito_demography – mosquito demography

  • xds_info_mosquito_dispersal – mosquito dispersal

  • xds_info_blood_feeding – blood feeding

  • xds_info_search_weights_blood – blood search weights

  • xds_info_available_blood_hosts – available blood hosts

Habitats & Egg Laying

  • xds_info_egg_laying – egg laying

  • xds_info_aquatic_habitats – aquatic habitats

  • xds_info_search_weights_habitat – habitat search weights

  • xds_info_available_habitats – habitat availability

Resources

  • xds_info_resources – resources

  • xds_info_available_sugar – sugar availability

  • xds_info_mosquito_traps – mosquito traps

Malaria Importation

  • xds_info_malaria_importation – malaria importation

  • xds_info_travel_malaria – travel malaria

  • xds_info_visitors – visitors

Malaria Control

  • xds_info_vector_control – vector control

  • xds_info_health – health-based Interventions

Internals

  • xds_info_port – ports

  • xds_info_junction – junctions

  • xds_info_parsing – parsing outputs
